title: QUOKKA Jigsaw Puzzles For 3 4 Year Olds - 60 Piece Jigsaws for Children Age 5 6 - Kids Puzzles With Mermaid Glam - Educational Learning Game for Preschoolers - Gift Toy for Boys and Girls 7-8
features: ENGAGING ARTISTIC IMAGES: Magical mermaids, seashell castles, and shimmering underwater scenes inspire storytelling and creativity; Puzzle size is 25 x 35 cm; These jigsaw puzzles for kids keep them focused while they build and explore

60 EASY-TO-HANDLE PIECES: Each piece is thoughtfully shaped and sized for small hands to grasp and fit together; A perfect transition from simpler 48 piece puzzles for kids ages 4-8 to more engaging builds that challenge without frustrating

FEEL PROUD OF YOUR CHILD’S PLAYTIME: Puzzle is made with FSC-certified paper and board from responsibly managed forests; Safe, eco-conscious design supports parents seeking meaningful kids puzzles for ages 4-6 and want sustainable toy choices

THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: Slim, eco-friendly packaging reduces waste with care for the planet; Puzzle itself is standard size like other kids puzzles ages 5-8; A fun and educational present that kids and parents both love

SUPPORTS YOUR CHILD’S DEVELOPMENT AT HOME: Encourages focused, screen-free play that builds patience, logic, and independence; A trusted choice for parents who want entertainment combined with early learning and skills for future educational success
description: Product description Swim into an enchanted sea with this beautifully illustrated 60-piece mermaid puzzle by QUOKKA. Featuring elegant mermaids, treasure chests, coral reefs, and sparkling seashell castles, this creative jigsaw puzzle transforms playtime into a magical undersea adventure. Designed for curious minds, it’s the perfect educational puzzle that boosts focus, memory, and problem-solving—all screen-free. Parents love the sustainable puzzle made from FSC-certified board and packed in slim, eco-friendly packaging. While the box saves space and reduces waste, the puzzle itself offers a full-size experience, just like any other durable puzzle. Whether used as a reward toy, classroom puzzle, or birthday gift puzzle, it’s a meaningful and fun hands-on activity. The set also includes free access to 100+ digital puzzles in the Quokka app. This learning puzzle is a trusted pick for families seeking an eco-friendly toy, a quiet time toy, or a magical family puzzle activity that supports early development. Safety Warning Not for children under 3 years old
